title: eurybia sibirica subsp. sibirica
intro: Eurybia sibirica subsp. sibirica, also known as Sibirian eurybia or Arctic aster, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Eurybia sibirica subsp. sibirica can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, particularly those related to respiratory and digestive issues.
